title: Enhanced Error Handling
impact: Leverage workerpool's robust error handling, timeouts, and cancellation support

tasks.description: Add timeout support for fuzzy search
stepByStep: Consider making timeout configurable via options parameter
Consider adding AbortController support to fuzzySearch method
Store pending task promises for potential cancellation

tasks.description: Add error logging for worker crashes
stepByStep: Add error event listener to pool (if supported)
Log worker crash events for debugging
acceptanceCriteria: System continues functioning after worker crash

stepByStep: Add test for graceful degradation on worker failure

successCriteria: Graceful fallback on timeout or worker crash
notes: Workerpool handles many error cases automatically (worker crashes, etc.). This sprint focuses on making those features visible and configurable in memory-mcp.
